reason: The remediation adds a line to /etc/modprobe.d/atm.conf to prevent the atm kernel module from being loaded. This is a non-disruptive change; ATM is not commonly used and disabling it does not affect core system functionality or access.
estimated_impact: networking affected; Potential loss of ATM networking functionality if ATM is in use; Modprobe config changes may be overwritten by package updates
